name: 折叠刀（★） | 北方森林
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been painted using a forest camouflage hydrographic. The woods can be a dangerous place... never travel alone
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这把武器使用森林迷彩花纹进行了涂装。 森林也许会是危险之地…… 不宜一人独往
